rule.description: Security Alert: Active SSH Brute Force Attack Detected and Escalated.
Security Alert: Automated Web Directory Enumeration Scanner Detected via User-Agent Match.
CRITICAL ALERT: Unauthorized Modification Detected inside Identity File (/etc/passwd).
SOAR Orchestration: Active Response successfully executed firewall drop command on endpoint.
SOAR Orchestration: Active Response successfully reversed/flushed firewall drop rule on endpoint.
